task: STARMIE SELECTOR LIVE-SMOKE DIAGNOSTIC PACK V1 (Model B)
one_line: top3_selector regresses on the deployed mirror (20% vs 55% off); offline mechanism points to low-confidence rank-2/3 turn-terminating overrides, but the causal link to the live losses is NOT measured.
data_gaps_forcing_directional: no per-game outcome linkage (smoke saved aggregate win/loss only; games not re-run) -> mechanism is confidence-based not outcome-based
classification on EXPERT replay states; regression manifested on OUR-AGENT mirror states (distribution shift)
live outcome split is n=20/mirror-cell: top1-vs-top3 Fisher p~=0.18 (NOT significant); aggregate 78-81% flat (off-vs-top3 p=1.0)
proposer rank is a coarsening of proposer prob (AUC 0.98) -> rank and prob are one confidence axis, not two corroborating findings
rank-1 gating necessary-at-best not sufficient: top1_gate still -10pp mirror + 128 rank-1 premature terminations (60% of premature)
non-terminal co-driver not excluded: 93 of 220 top3-exclusive overrides are non-terminal incl. a RETREAT family present ONLY in top3 (33 picks) + 21 attack re-targets
field_vs_mirror: top3 beats off on 3/5 field decks (+10pp) but crashes the mirror (-35pp) -- selection helps weak policies, hurts the strong mirror.
v2_recommendation_for_model_a: Gate terminal (ATTACK/END) overrides on STAKES not rank alone: block when safe-dev remains AND no guaranteed-KO AND no game-win (reaches the 128 rank-1 premature terminations a pure rank gate misses). Allow KO/gamewin terminals. Decide separately on the 33 top3-only RETREAT picks + attack re-targets. Do not ship any gate as outcome-validated.
verification: 4 independent adversarial reviewers + synthesis (Workflow). All returned holds_with_caveats; synthesis independently set B_FAILURE_MODE_DIRECTIONAL. Every quantitative claim re-derived from the JSONL and reproduces exactly.
integrity: PASS (artifacts exist, JSONL parses, no pilot/outcome/future leak in runtime fields, selector default off, no gameplay files modified)
constraints_honored: no games run; heuristics/selector unchanged; no submission; not merged; Model A files untouched.
